title: Fortunate Wood
description: Makes the fortune enchant work on naturally generated logs.
body:
## Fortunate Wood

**Ever wanted Fortune to work on wood like it does on ores?**  
This mod makes it possible!

Chop trees with a Fortune-enchanted axe and get significantly more logs per tree.

---

### Compatibility
Affects any natural log (from Minecraft’s `logs.json` block tag), but won’t apply to logs placed by players.
